title: Draft motion for summary judgment
description: Draft motion for summary judgment in the Smith v. Jones case.

title: Review discovery documents
description: Review discovery documents from the opposing party in the Acme Corp case.

title: Prepare for deposition
description: Prepare for the deposition of Mr. Doe.

title: File amended complaint
description: File the amended complaint with the court clerk for the Johnson v. Adams case.

title: Research case law on contract breach
description: Research relevant case law and precedents on breach of contract for the Acme Corp matter.

title: Draft settlement agreement
description: Draft proposed settlement agreement for review by both parties in the Rivera custody dispute.

title: Obtain expert witness report
description: Coordinate with Dr. Patel to obtain the forensic accounting expert witness report.

title: Send client update letter
description: Draft and send a status update letter to Mr. Smith regarding the progress of his case.

title: Review opposing counsel's motion
description: Review and prepare response to opposing counsel's motion to dismiss.

title: Prepare trial exhibits
description: Organize and label all trial exhibits for the upcoming hearing in Case CR-2024-045.

title: Conduct witness interviews
description: Interview three key witnesses for the upcoming trial in the employment discrimination case.

title: Prepare interrogatories
description: Draft set of interrogatories to be sent to the defendant in the personal injury case.

title: Review insurance policy documents
description: Analyse the insurance policy documents provided by the client for coverage analysis.

title: File notice of appeal
description: Prepare and file the notice of appeal with the Court of Appeals within the statutory deadline.

title: Update client contact information
description: Verify and update the contact information for all active clients in the case management system.

title: Draft demand letter
description: Draft a formal demand letter to the defendant in the property dispute case.

title: Obtain medical records
description: Request and obtain all relevant medical records from the treating physicians for the injury claim.

title: Prepare closing arguments
description: Write and rehearse closing arguments for the upcoming trial in the fraud case.

title: Review lease agreement
description: Review commercial lease agreement for potential issues before the client signs.

title: Schedule mediation session
description: Coordinate with opposing counsel to schedule the court-ordered mediation session.

title: Prepare pre-trial memorandum
description: Prepare comprehensive pre-trial memorandum outlining legal theories and evidence.

title: Verify court filing deadlines
description: Confirm all upcoming filing deadlines across active cases and update the docket calendar.

title: Negotiate contract terms
description: Negotiate revised contract terms with the counterparty's legal counsel on behalf of the client.

title: Conduct legal research on jurisdiction
description: Research whether the court has proper jurisdiction over the out-of-state defendant.

title: Prepare witness examination questions
description: Draft direct and cross-examination questions for all witnesses listed for the upcoming trial.
